nodes.name: Dukkha
nodes.description: A central Dharma concept often translated as suffering, unsatisfactoriness, or stress.

nodes.name: Sunyata
nodes.description: A Mahayana concept commonly translated as emptiness.

nodes.name: Theravada
nodes.description: A Buddhist tradition preserving the Pali Canon.

nodes.name: Madhyamaka
nodes.description: A Mahayana philosophical school associated with analysis of emptiness.

nodes.name: Nagarjuna
nodes.description: A major Buddhist philosopher associated with Madhyamaka.

nodes.name: Mulamadhyamakakarika
nodes.description: A foundational Madhyamaka text attributed to Nagarjuna.
